results.title: JavaScript Course for Beginners – Your First Step to Web Development
results.reason: Mosh is highly praised in comments for his 'no-fluff' approach and logical progression from variables to functions, making it the gold standard for absolute beginners.
summary: Learn how to set up your coding environment
Understand how to use variables and constants
Master basic data types like strings and numbers
Write your first simple programs using functions

results.title: JavaScript Visualized - Event Loop, Web APIs, (Micro)task Queue
results.reason: Lydia Hallie provides world-class visual explanations of the event loop, but this is an advanced 'core' concept that may overwhelm a total beginner.
summary: See how code runs behind the scenes
Learn how the browser handles multiple tasks
Understand the order in which code executes
Discover how timers and web tools work

results.title: JavaScript tutorial for beginners 🌐
results.reason: Bro Code's structured environment setup and step-by-step HTML integration are specifically noted by viewers as being extremely easy to follow.
summary: Get started with basic coding syntax quickly
Learn how to display messages to users
Understand how to store and change data
Build a foundation for making interactive websites

results.title: How JavaScript Works 🔥& Execution Context | Namaste JavaScript Ep.1
results.reason: Akshay Saini is legendary for explaining 'how' JS works (Execution Context), but it is more conceptual than a 'how to code' tutorial for a first-day beginner.
summary: Learn how the computer reads your code
Understand the hidden box where code runs
Discover how variables are saved in memory
See the two phases of code execution

results.title: Learn All the JavaScript Basics in 20 Minutes
results.reason: A solid, concise alternative for those who find the 48-minute Mosh video too long; it covers the syntax basics efficiently.
summary: Learn essential math and logic for coding
Understand how to make decisions with code
Master repeating tasks using simple loops
Get a fast overview of core concepts
